title: Bureau of Missing Persons
writer: Robert Presnell Sr., John H. Ayers, Carol Bird
actors: Bette Davis, Lewis Stone, Pat O'Brien
plot: A sweet blonde goes to the police looking for her missing husband. When it turns out her husband is both a murder victim and a bachelor - and that the blonde is suspect #1, tough cop Butch Saunders comes up with a scheme to crack ...
